example_sentence: De repente escuché un ruido en la calle.
example_translation: Suddenly I heard a noise in the street.
I was reading while I waited for the bus.

example_sentence: Estaba durmiendo y entonces sonó la alarma.
example_translation: I was sleeping and then the alarm went off.

translation: to meet for the first time (preterite) vs. to know/be acquainted with (imperfect)
example_sentence: Ayer conocí a la nueva maestra.
example_translation: Yesterday I met the new teacher (for the first time).

translation: to find out (preterite) vs. to know (imperfect)
example_sentence: Sabía que era difícil, pero lo intenté.
example_translation: I knew it was difficult, but I tried.

example_sentence: Me detuve cuando escuché mi nombre.
example_translation: I stopped when I heard my name.

example_sentence: Volteé y vi a mi amigo.
example_translation: I turned around and saw my friend.

example_sentence: En ese momento supe que algo estaba mal.
example_translation: At that moment I realized something was wrong.

example_sentence: Estaba yo en el mercado cuando vi algo increíble.
example_translation: I was at the market when I saw something incredible.

translation: to make someone sick / to not agree with someone (food)
example_sentence: Comí mariscos y me cayeron muy mal.
example_translation: I ate seafood and it made me really sick.

example_sentence: Las calles estaban vacías a esa hora.
example_translation: The streets were empty at that hour.

example_sentence: A mi abuela le encantaba contar cuentos.
example_translation: My grandmother loved to tell stories.
